Here's a plan for your date night on May 16, 2026:

First, for dinner at 7:00 PM, I recommend **Roma Antica**. This Italian restaurant has a 4.5 rating and is described as a "welcoming neighborhood spot serving modern Italian eats & wine in petite digs with marble accents," which fits the "vibes-y" and "romantic dinner" criteria. It is also within your specified price range.

After dinner, for drinks at 9:00 PM, you can head to **Mamanoko**. This Japanese restaurant and cocktail bar has a 4.5 rating and is described as a "fashionable outpost with a convivial vibe serving sake, spirits, sushi & Japanese small plates," which fits the "vibes-y" and "drinks" criteria. It is also within walking distance of Roma Antica and within your specified price range.
